title: Why You're Still Broke

description: my little brother asked how to not be broke at 18, so I texted him the whole playbook. secured cards, roth IRAs, emergency funds — explained simply.

title: Your Savings Account Is Robbing You
description: your savings account is robbing you — the math your bank prays you never do. big banks pay 0.01%, high-yield pays ~4%. same insurance, 400x the interest.

description: found the realest money advice on the internet in a reddit thread. the top comments on going broke in college are better than most finance classes.

description: your 2026 money wrapped just dropped and it's not looking good. the doordash math alone will make you want to change your habits.

title: Why Am I Always Broke?
description: we've all searched 'why am I always broke' at 2am. here's every real answer — the doordash math, the savings checkpoint, and how to start investing with $50.

title: The Cost Of Looking Rich, Itemized
description: asked for the receipt on 'looking rich' and it printed this. the financed car alone costs more than most people's first home down payment.

description: every student side hustle, officially ranked S to F tier. tutoring pays 3x minimum wage and nobody your age is doing it.

description: 4 questions, no calculator. the credit score myth in question 3 is the most expensive misconception in america.

title: The Local Scholarship Cheat Code
description: the local scholarship cheat code nobody's counselor mentions. lower applicants, way better odds — colleges hand out billions nobody applies for.

title: Read Your Bank Statement Like This
description: reading a transaction history out loud, fee by fee. the overdraft fee for having $0 is still the wildest thing banks get away with.

description: POV: the group chat plans a trip and one friend says 'i can't afford it' out loud. loud budgeting is a real trend — 42% of gen z does it now.

title: Your Screen Time Report, But For Money

description: your money habits made dating profiles and some are massive red flags. buy now pay later gets swiped left immediately.

title: Your Money Habits As A Streaming Show
description: Broke: Season 7 — critically acclaimed, somehow renewed again. the show that would actually change your life is sitting unwatched in your list.

description: the app store listing for 'Being Broke' is too accurate. 1.2 stars, in-app purchases include a $34 overdraft fee.

description: read my own venmo feed like a crime scene. the most important payment you'll ever make has zero likes on it.
